content:
### Task 16: Integrate components into TracesView and AgentsView In `DetailPanel`, add a percentile line inside each span row. Find the existing block (around line 303) that renders `{fields &&
{fields}
}` and add after it: ```tsx {(stats.p50_ms ?? 0) > 0 && (
p50: {stats.p50_ms?.toFixed(0)}ms · p95: {stats.p95_ms?.toFixed(0)}ms · p99: {stats.p99_ms?.toFixed(0)}ms
)} ``` This adds a new `
` inside the existing `
` wrapper, after the fields line. Do NOT replace the surrounding code — only insert this block. - **Step 3: Integrate LiveSessionsBar into AgentsView** In `AgentsView.tsx`, add import: ```typescript import { LiveSessionsBar } from "./LiveSessionsBar"; ``` Add `LiveSessionsBar` at the top of the `AgentsView` return, just inside the `agents-view` div: ```tsx return (
setExpandedId(agentId)} />
{/* ... existing ... */} ``` - **Step 4: Build the dashboard to verify** Run: `cd /workspaces/corvia-workspace/tools/corvia-dashboard && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20` Expected: builds successfully (or note TypeScript errors and fix them) - **Step 5: Commit** ```bash cd /workspaces/corvia-workspace git add tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/TracesView.tsx tools/corvia-dashboard/src/components/AgentsView.tsx git commit -m "feat(dashboard-ui): integrate GcPanel, WaterfallView, LiveSessionsBar into dashboard" ``` ---
